title: Dark Mode Vanilla
description: Dark Mode Vanilla is a clean, fully dark‑themed vanilla GUI resource pack that makes every menu and inventory easier on the eyes
body:
# **Dark Mode Vanilla**
_transforms Minecraft’s user interface into a cohesive, low‑glare dark theme while preserving the original vanilla look and feel. Every GUI element — menus, inventories, tooltips, HUD elements, and creative‑mode tab backgrounds — has been retinted and redesigned for improved contrast and readability in low‑light play sessions. The pack keeps block and item textures unchanged so gameplay remains familiar; only interface elements are adjusted to deliver a modern, comfortable dark‑mode experience._

## Features
- Full dark GUI: All menus, inventories, and HUD elements are converted to a consistent dark palette.
- 
- Vanilla faithful: UI shapes, spacing, and icons remain true to vanilla Minecraft for minimal disruption.
- 
- Improved readability: Text contrast and icon clarity optimized for night play and long sessions.
- 
- Creative tab backgrounds: Darkened tab panels and item‑slot surfaces for a unified look.
- 
- Light accents: Subtle cool blue and gray highlights preserve visual hierarchy without bright colors.
- 
- Low performance impact: Only GUI textures are modified; no heavy assets or shaders required.
- 
- Version support: Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.20 through 1.21.8 and later.
